sys_properties.choices: Serial Number,FQDN,FQDN and Serial,FQDN or Serial,Serial or FQDN
sys_properties.description:
Identify Endpoint by Fields

Choose how to uniquely identify endpoints in your environment: By Serial number or FQDN alone, by either serial number OR FQDN, or by the strict combination of serial number AND FQDN.
By default, Tanium Integration Core uniquely identifies endpoints by serial number and/or FQDN (prioritizing serial number if a match is not found by both serial + FQDN). In most cases, this is ideal. However, some customers may choose to identify endpoints by Fully Qualified Domain Name (FQDN), or by serial number only. Some customers may also prefer to identify endpoints only by the strict combination of both FQDN and Serial, without failing over if a match is not found on both.

Default: Serial or FQDN
sys_properties.name: x_taniu_tan_core.identify_endpoint_by_field
